title: isoetes longissima subsp. tenuissima
intro: Isoetes longissima subsp. tenuissima is a rare and endangered aquatic plant species, commonly known as quillwort, which belongs to the Isoetaceae family. Research has indicated that this plant has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, although more studies are needed to confirm its effectiveness. The potential health benefits of Isoetes longissima subsp. tenuissima include its possible use in reducing inflammation and improving antioxidant defenses, although human trials are lacking. In traditional herbal practices, quillwort has been used in various preparations, including teas and infusions, but its use and preparation should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
